test.note: The services.yaml test command exits 1 due to pre-existing failures (pandas 3.x StringArray incompatibility). All failures are documented as pre-existing in .factory/library/environment.md. Prior worker ran full test suite: 942 pass / 46 fail on Python 3.12/3.13, 884 pass / 104 fail on Python 3.14. All failures confirmed pre-existing. The -x flag stops at the first pre-existing failure; meaningful results require --ignore flags (documented in library/environment.md). Validator treated as PASS given all failures are pre-existing.

appliedUpdates.description: Clarified problog dependency status: problog is NOT in pyproject.toml (neither core nor dev). Added warning not to add it to core [project] dependencies.
Added note that the 2 errors in each Python version's test results are pre-existing pytest collection errors.
Reverted uncommitted modification to pyproject.toml that incorrectly added problog>=2.2.10 to core [project] dependencies. The committed HEAD version correctly omits problog from core deps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Testing & Validation Guidance section: add the --ignore flags needed for meaningful test results. The current test command 'uv run pytest neurolang/ -x -q' will stop at the first problog ModuleNotFoundError before any migration-related tests run. Add: 'For comprehensive results, use: uv run --python 3.X pytest neurolang/ -q --ignore=neurolang/utils/server --ignore=neurolang/probabilistic/cplogic/tests --ignore=neurolang/probabilistic/tests/test_marg_query_resolution.py --ignore=neurolang/probabilistic/tests/test_probabilistic_solvers.py --ignore=neurolang/tests/test_relational_algebra_provenance.py --ignore=neurolang/tests/test_relational_algebra_semiring.py'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature run-tests-all-python-versions documented that -x stops at problog import errors. The full test run in library/environment.md used the --ignore flags to get meaningful results.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a section 'UV Install Verification Results' to environment.md documenting exact commands run per Python version
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: The library/environment.md already documents the results at an adequate summary level. The exact per-version venv commands would be redundant with the documented overall approach.

rejectedObservations.observation: Note stale artifacts in dist/ directory from multiple build versions
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: The dist/ directory contents are gitignored artifacts. Documenting specific artifact filenames would become stale. The important fact (VAL-CROSS-002 passes) is already documented.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document Unknown type behavioral difference on 3.12+ (can be instantiated)
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: This is a subtle implementation detail that is non-blocking and no tests exercise it. Adding it to library/environment.md would be low-value noise. If it becomes an issue, it should be addressed in the type_system code itself.
